headline: Chip Stock Selloff Deepens in Asia as TSMC Fails to Impress
summary: (Bloomberg) -- A selloff in Asian chip stocks gathered pace, as Taiwan Semiconductor Manufacturing Co.’s strong results failed to clear investors’ lofty expectations, stoking worries over heavy spending and a weaker outlook for profitability. headline: Morgan Stanley (MS) Launches Spot Crypto Trading On ETrade For Retail Investors
summary: Morgan Stanley (NYSE:MS) has launched spot cryptocurrency trading for retail customers on its E*TRADE platform. The new feature gives E*TRADE users access to direct crypto trading alongside traditional securities. This marks an expansion of Morgan Stanley's digital asset offering to a broader base of individual investors. For investors following Morgan Stanley, the move to offer spot cryptocurrency trading on E*TRADE brings digital assets into the same ecosystem as equities, ETFs, and...

headline: Hasbro (HAS) Stock Fair Value Edges Lower As Analysts Weigh Brand Strength And Caution
summary: Hasbro’s fair value estimate has been trimmed from US$113.07 to US$109.93, signaling a more cautious stance on where analysts see the stock settling in their models. That shift aligns with research that balances optimism around core brands and earnings power with more restrained valuation assumptions and a choppier near term setup. As you read on, you will see how this evolving price target story fits into the wider Hasbro narrative and what to watch as new information comes through. Analyst...

headline: Michael Burry Says ‘Good Time’ to Chase Hong Kong Stock Bargains
summary: (Bloomberg) -- Michael Burry, the investor made famous in The Big Short, recommends bargain hunting in Hong Kong’s stock market after it lagged peers during the global AI rally this year.
